subtitle: Sign in to access your data rooms
checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account
signUpSubtitle: Create an account to manage your data rooms
invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Sign up if you don't have an account yet, or confirm your email.
emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
userAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
oauthFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
googleProviderDisabled: Google sign-in is not enabled. In Supabase Dashboard go to Authentication → Providers → Google, enable it, and add your Google OAuth client ID and secret.
oauthCodeExchangeFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed. Close this tab, return to the app, and try signing in with Google again.
